title: Automatic Data Processing: Conservative Growth Of 13-16% In This Volatile Market
text: ADP's last quarter's earnings were great, beating expectations by $0.13 at $2.21, and revenues were up 10% year-over-year and beat expected revenues by $50 million. Automatic Data Processing's total return outperformed the Dow average for my 77-month test period by 119.22%, which is great, and the present entry point is fair.
